PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 9th October, 2019 G.S.R. 765(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), read with sub-rules (1) and (2) of rule 4 of the Indian Administrative Service (Cadre) Rules, 1954, the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Himachal Pradesh, hereby makes the following regulations further to amend the Indian Administrative Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1955, namely:─ 1. (1) These Regulations may be called the Indian Administrative Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Second Amendment Regulations, 2019. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Administrative Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1955, in the Schedule, for the heading “Himachal Pradesh” and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted namely:─ -- 3 of 9 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] “Himachal Pradesh Senior Duty Posts under the State Government 84 Chief Secretary 1 Additional Chief Secretary 2 Principal Secretary 7 Financial Commissioner (Appeals) 1 Finance Commissioner cum-Principal Secretary (Revenue) 1 Principal Resident Commissioner, New Delhi 1 Divisional Commissioners 3 Secretary to Government 10 Secretary (Lokayukta) 1 Chief Electoral Officer-cum-Secretary (Election) 1 Director of Industries 1 Excise & Taxation Commissioner 1 Registrar, Co-operative Societies 1 Director of Tourism & Civil Aviation 1 Director of Vigilance 1 Secretary to Governor 1 Special Secretary/Additional Secretary/Joint Secretary to the Government 13 Secretary, Public Service Commission 1 Director, Food, Civil Supplies & Consumer Affairs 1 Director Rural Development & Panchayati Raj 1 Labour Commissioner-cum-Director Employment & Trg. 1 Director, Transport 1 Settlement Officers 2 Deputy Commissioners 12 Commissioner, Departmental Enquiries 1 Additional Deputy Commissioners 5 Additional Director of Industries 1 Director of Land Records 1 Director of Urban Development 1 Director, Information Technology 1 Director, Empowerment of Scheduled Castes, Other Backward Classes, Minorities & the Specially Abled 1 Director, Energy 1 Director, Women & Child Dev. No. 11031/04/2017-AIS-II(A)] JYOTSNA GUPTA, Under Secy. Note 1: Prior to the issue of this notification, the Total Authorized Strength of Himachal Pradesh IAS Cadre was 147. Note 2: The principal Regulations were published in the Gazette of India vide S.R.O. No. 3350, dated 22.10.1955. 1222(अ) 19.12.2018 12. 218(अ) 13.03.2019 MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 9th October, 2019 G.S.R. 766 (E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Himachal Pradesh hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Indian Administrative Service (Pay) Rules, 2016, namely:─ 1. (1) These rules may be called the Indian Administrative Service (Pay) Second Amendment Rules, 2019. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Administrative Service (Pay) Rules, 2016, in Schedule II,– (a) in Part A relating to Posts carrying pay above the Senior Scale of pay of the Indian Administrative Service under the State Governments, in the table, for the entry “Himachal Pradesh” occurring in the first column and corresponding entries in the second column, the following shall be substituted namely:─ “Himachal Pradesh Chief Secretary Level 17 in the pay matrix Additional Chief Secretary Level 17 in the pay matrix Principal Secretary Level 15 in the pay matrix Financial Commissioner (Appeals) Level 15 in the pay matrix Finance Commissioner cum-Principal Secretary (Revenue) Level 15 in the pay matrix Principal Resident Commissioner, New Delhi Level 15 in the pay matrix Divisional Commissioners Level 14 in the pay matrix Secretary to Government Level 14 in the pay matrix Secretary (Lokayukta) Level 14 in the pay matrix Chief Electoral Officer-cum-Secretary (Election) Level 14 in the pay matrix Director of Industries Level 14 in the pay matrix Excise & Taxation Commissioner Level 14 in the pay matrix Registrar, Co-operative Societies Level 14 in the pay matrix Director of Tourism & Civil Aviation Level 14 in the pay matrix Director of Vigilance Level 14 in the pay matrix Secretary to Governor Level 14 in the pay matrix -- 8 of 9 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] (b) in Part B relating to Posts carrying pay in the Senior Scale of the Indian Administrative Service under the State Governments including posts carrying Special Allowance in addition to pay, in the table for the entries occurring under Himachal Pradesh the following shall be substituted,– “Special Secretary/Additional Secretary/ Joint Secretary to the Government Secretary, Public Service Commission Director, Food, Civil Supplies & Consumer Affairs Director Rural Development & Panchayati Raj Labour Commissioner-cum-Director Employment & Trg. Director, Transport Settlement Officers Deputy Commissioners Commissioner, Departmental Enquiries Additional Deputy Commissioners Additional Director of Industries Director of Land Records Director of Urban Development Director, Information Technology Director, Empowerment of Scheduled Castes, Other Backward Classes, Minorities & the Specially Abled Director, Energy Director, Women & Child Dev. Dept. Director, Town & Country Planning Director, Public Finance & Public Enterprises Director, H. P. Institute of Public Administration Director, Ayurveda Chief Executive Officer, Baddi Barotiwala Nalagarh Development Authority, Baddi ” [F. No. 11031/04/2017-AIS-II(B)] JYOTSNA GUPTA, Under Secy. Note: The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, vide number G.S.R. 870(E) dated the 08th September, 2016 and subsequently amended by the following G.S.R.
